summary: Completed testing of WorkflowAI Quick Templates feature (Iteration 4). All new features working correctly. Dashboard has 6 Quick Templates (CI/CD Pipeline, Data ETL, API Gateway, E-commerce Order, ML Pipeline, Microservices). Compare page has 4 Quick Templates. Template selection auto-fills textarea and closes template grid. All existing features (auth, history, model selector, compare models) still working.
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Templates feature fully tested. Dashboard has 6 templates, Compare page has 4 templates. Template selection auto-fills textarea and closes grid. All previous features (auth, history, model selector, compare models) still working.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/models - returns 3 models: claude, gpt, gemini (PASSED)
GET /api/auth/me - returns user data with valid session (PASSED)
GET /api/workflow-history - returns list with valid session (PASSED)
frontend_ui_tests: Login page loads and accepts admin credentials (PASSED)
Dashboard loads with Quick Templates button visible (PASSED)
Quick Templates button shows 6 template cards when clicked (PASSED)
All 6 templates found: CI/CD Pipeline, Data ETL, API Gateway, E-commerce Order, ML Pipeline, Microservices (PASSED)
Clicking template auto-fills textarea with workflow text (PASSED)
History toggle button works and shows previous analyses panel (PASSED)
Compare Models link navigates to /compare page (PASSED)
Compare page has Quick Templates button with 4 templates (PASSED)
Compare page templates: CI/CD Pipeline, Data ETL, API Gateway, E-commerce Order (PASSED)
Clicking template on Compare page auto-fills textarea (PASSED)
Compare templates grid closes after selection (PASSED)
Logout button works and redirects to login page (PASSED)
Register page accessible from login page (PASSED)

quick_templates_dashboard.details: 6 templates available: CI/CD Pipeline, Data ETL, API Gateway, E-commerce Order, ML Pipeline, Microservices. Each template has id, label, color, bgColor, borderColor, description, and workflow text. Clicking template auto-fills textarea and closes grid.

quick_templates_compare.details: 4 templates available on Compare page: CI/CD Pipeline, Data ETL, API Gateway, E-commerce Order. Same behavior as dashboard templates.

model_selector.details: Dropdown shows 3 models: Claude Sonnet 4.5, GPT-5.2, Gemini 3 Flash

history_toggle.details: History button toggles Previous Analyses panel. Shows workflow history with model used badges.

compare_models_navigation.details: Compare Models link in dashboard header navigates to /compare page. Back to Dashboard link works.

authentication.details: Login with admin@workflowai.com / admin123 works. Logout redirects to login page. Register page accessible.

api_endpoints.details: All tested endpoints return expected responses. /api/models returns 3 models. Auth endpoints work correctly.
